itemListElement.reviewBody: After 11 years, since my daughter nursery at Pathways Aravali, the problem with as hook started in grade 6, we expected and were confident that a safe, supportive environment for our daughter as she transition from PYP to MYP. Unfortunately, despite repeated reports of bullying, exclusion and emotional distress, the school failed to take meaningful action. We were assured she would not be placed with the same student involved in her emotional distress entire of last year but yet the school reversed its own commitment. The space that we wanted that the two children should have for atleast one academic year was not respected..and both children were in same section, after three months of this academic year my daughter again faced same exclusion like previous.  The counsellor last year showed clear bias and her approach further eroded our child’s confidence today instead of protecting her. While many subject teachers are excellent, the school’s management and student-wellbeing system lack accountability and sensitivity. Behind the impressive campus, vulnerable children are not safeguarded. A disappointing and painful experience.

I am Akshit Srivastava  and I was in Pathways World School Aravalli in Grade 11 from the year 2020-2021 .
I would gave my sincere and honest feedback.
I started my journey in Pathways with a lot of expectations of high degree in future somewhere overall development and the growth .
But It was my most regretting decision where it is still with me .
It all happened as in one year there are two semesters.
In semester 1 everything was good just a side issues which keeps happening and going .
And just from a CBSE to an IB background I was able and was yet in understanding the concepts.
Although still was going good .
But from the second semester the most disastrous things had happened with me actually I was trapped by a teacher in pathways regarding social media chatting and violation of school rules as being misguided for boarders to reach in campus where the areas boarders were not allowed but he insisted me only which he left the school forever .
I was given a wrong way of special attention like discussing about me in class negative things which I felt bad after trusting him so much when I questioned him he denied that he didn’t says.Anyways I then thought to leave it but after that social media chatting gone wrong of beyond teacher student type of friendships and love jokes.
Although I contributed in hiding which I had admitted it’s wrong but then in the second semester …………….
But when it was exposed I just wrote my emotions to school and after that only my life became hell.
I was constantly being criticised especially by saurav sinha sir dean of residence ,saikat sengupta sir amazon hostel supervisor ,Nihal sir counsellor and senior school principle Manjula shenoi maam .
I could not even properly breathe even for a second I was misguided by one teacher with all this .
And then when I got some good topper friends these people only senior school principle Manjula maam ,Nihal sir ,Saurav sir and Saikat sir stopped me in talking to them as they were trying to help me socially and academically .

But it was their bad eye that were not allowing me to attend. School only just they were saying that we would let you know when to come but weeks had passed and no response then my classes were missing and I only need to come but after that they had made that of my low grades one or two instead in the beginning of the session they said that incase my marks are not equivalent to diploma programme I would be moved towards course programme.
But then they said to expel me from school and in the mid way it’s common that no school would take and as a result my entire career got ruined .
I got a mental breakdown by this even director maam Sonya Mehta maam didn’t support Me at all and supported them instead.
By writing emails expressing my opinions and mindset they were telling me to stop making fun of me that I don’t know that level English and academics and also then showing their egoism .
I was just left in a helpless situation after that they said as only academics then they said only behaviour and overall was very confusing to me on their repetitive denials to help me and saying that they were not interested to listen to me .
And after that I finally 2nd semester ended although my grades due to them which I became mentally affected and saying studying for me is of no use and when I ask them why they said they didn’t say it later on.
Finally one known  school Vivekananda accepted me
And then my academic was good back to normal and I had scored 88 percent in CBSE board .
I am saying for emotionally weak children and need of social support pathways is not for them they deserve something better than that .
For academically and emotionally strong children pathways is for them .
That was for day boarders but for boarders you can’t manage .
I swear this is my honest experience in pathways the trauma of that Is still with me .
Now saikat sengupta sir and saurav sinha sir are in barrow school harrow I bangalore .
These ones !
Thankyou !

Pathways Aravali was an amazing school and it taught me a lot, but if I am being honest, it teaches more than education at its school. It teaches people how to use each other, it teaches how to bully, it teaches how to not be able to survive into the real world. It is like any other institute and it still affects me mentally after 7 years. Pathways Aravali is a business and is more focused on making robots rather than human beings. If you look at it from outside, it looks amazing, but the more you get to know, the deeper you fall into the pit, not being able to get out, no matter how hard you try. It stays with you for the rest of your life, making you suffer and regret every decision of your life from the minute you step into their school. I am not staying Pathways Aravali is bad, I am just saying that it will stay with you no matter how far way you try to get from it even after 20 or 30 years, it will stay with you and affect you.
Happy place to be. Once a Pathwazian forever a Pathwazian. :)
Lovely place to work! Very grateful to be a part of the Pathways family ❤️
Pathways is a beautiful school with the most amazing faculty and visionary leaders.

Holistic learning at PWS isn't just a buzzword or tick in the box. It's the school's style or panache . It's the statement the school makes with elan. I feel fortunate, privileged and grateful to be employed by the Pathwats World Achool.

Infrastructure is good.
Facilities like cafeteria, garden, grounds, hall area, AV rooms etc. All are good.
Lifechanging experience for my child.What Pathways helped her achieve in 2 years of her time there,no other school did.Primarily because of the dedicated teachers and great infrastructure.

My child has been going to Pathways for 4 years now and it truly was the best decision to admit her in this institution. The school is nestled in greenery. Away from the pollution, it gives a great environment for the kids to not only study but engage in all kids of physical activities. The teachers are very kind and accessible. Their keen observation regarding each child is very precise. The school gives equal weight to extra curricular activity like dance and art, which enables the child to focus on all areas of development. During the pandemic, the world might have stopped, but learning for the kids did not. They very quickly took the online mode, ensuring that the kids have to feel normal even in these uncertain times.
